offline.title: No internet connection
offline.description: Daily List needs an internet connection to sync your tasks and power the AI assistant.

auth.subtitle: Your personal AI planner. Simple, smart, and always on your side.
auth.demoDescription: Firebase is not configured. You can explore the app with a demo account.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
errors.emailInUse: An account already exists with this email.
errors.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorizedDomain: Popup closed immediately. Please ensure this domain is added to 'Authorized domains' in your Firebase Console.
errors.popupBlocked: Popup blocked by browser. Please allow popups for this site.
errors.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key. Please check your .env or firebase.js config.
errors.operationNotAllowed: Google Sign-In is not enabled. Please enable it in Firebase Console.

onboarding.title: Let's set up your lists
onboarding.subtitle: How many lists do you want to start with? You can always add more later.

dashboard.title: Today
dashboard.subtitle: {{date}}
dashboard.noTasksHint: Tap the button below to add your first task.

ai.greeting: Hey! I'm here to help you plan your day. What's on your list?
ai.alarmAsk: Want me to add this to your schedule and set an alarm for the start time?
ai.alarmSet: Done — alarm set for {{time}}. I'll remind you right here when it's time.
ai.alarmDeclined: Got it — I won't set an alarm unless you give me permission. Just let me know if you change your mind.
ai.notificationDenied: I'd like to set an alarm, but your browser has notifications turned off. You can enable them in your browser settings.
ai.permissionNeeded: To set alarms, I'll need your browser's notification permission. May I ask for it?

pricing.title: Unlock everything
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

trial.name: Trial
trial.description: Try it all, no card needed.

pricing.checkoutNote: Secure checkout via Stripe. Cancel anytime.
pricing.trialNote: No credit card required for trial.
